2604.27617.title: Robust Lightweight Crack Classification for Real-Time UAV Bridge Inspection
2604.27617.paper_summary: With the widespread application of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) in bridge structural health monitoring, deep learning-based automatic crack detection has become a major research focus. However, practical UAV inspections still face four key challenges: weak crack features, degraded imaging conditions, severe class imbalance, and limited computational resources for practical UAV inspection workflows. To address these issues, this paper proposes a unified lightweight convolutional neural network framework composed of four synergistic components: a lightweight backbone network, a Convolutional Block Attention Module (CBAM) for channel and spatial enhancement, a directed robust augmentation strategy based on inspection-scene priors, and Focal Loss for hard-sample learning under class imbalance. Experiments on the SDNET2018 bridge deck dataset show that the proposed method achieves an inference speed of 825 FPS with only 11.21M parameters and 1.82G FLOPs. Compared with the baseline model, the complete framework improves the F1-score by 2.51% and recall by 3.95%. In addition, Grad-CAM visualizations indicate that the introduced attention module shifts the model's focus from scattered regions to precise tracking along crack trajectories. Overall, this study achieves a strong balance among accuracy, speed, and robustness, providing a practical solution for ground-station assisted real-time deployment in UAV bridge inspections. The source code is available at: https://github.com/skylynf/AttXNet .
2604.27617.paper_summary_zh: 隨著無人機（UAV）在橋樑結構健康監測中的廣泛應用，基於深度學習的自動裂縫檢測已成為主要的研究焦點。<lb/>然而，實際的無人機檢查仍面臨四個關鍵挑戰：裂縫特徵薄弱、成像條件惡化、類別不平衡嚴重，以及實際無人機檢查工作流程中計算資源有限。<lb/>為了解決這些問題，本文提出了一個統一的輕量級卷積神經網絡框架，由四個協同組件組成：一個輕量級的主幹網絡、一個用於通道和空間增強的卷積塊注意力模塊（CBAM）、一個基於檢查場景先驗的有向穩健增強策略，以及用於類別不平衡下難樣本學習的焦點損失（Focal Loss）。<lb/>在SDNET2018橋面數據集上的實驗表明，所提出的方法在僅有11.21M參數和1.82G FLOPs的情況下達到了825 FPS的推理速度。<lb/>與基線模型相比，完整框架將F1-score提高了2.51%，召回率提高了3.95%。<lb/>此外，Grad-CAM可視化結果顯示，引入的注意力模塊將模型的重點從分散區域轉移到沿裂縫軌跡的精確跟踪。<lb/>總體而言，本研究在準確性、速度和穩健性之間實現了良好的平衡，為無人機橋樑檢查中的地面站輔助實時部署提供了實用解決方案。<lb/>源代碼可在以下鏈接獲得：https://github.com/skylynf/AttXNet 。
2604.27617.author: Wei Li et.al.
2604.27617.authors: Wei Li, Haisheng Li, Weijie Li, Jiandong Wang, Kaichen Ma, Luming Yang
